task: Advanced high-value task: Thermal Process Lethality Point Audit-Ready Output Schema. Scenario: a production incident review board wants to convert raw records into a repeatable decision process for thermal process lethality point. Embedded packet: Records: R1 temperature_C=73 duration_min=113 z_value_C=8; R2 temperature_C=82 duration_min=109 z_value_C=11; R3 temperature_C=68 duration_min=124 z_value_C=7. Remediation options: O1 changes temperature_C by -12% cost=92000; O2 changes duration_min by -18% cost=106000; O3 changes z_value_C by -25% cost=64000; max_budget=132000. Rules and constraints: lethality=duration*10^((T-80)/z); cumulative target>=12 equivalent minutes; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: produce a concise gate decision that includes calculations, caveats, residual risk, and machine-readable exception labels. Deliver thermal_lethality_4.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
